title: WebSearchOptions
description: Configuration options for web search behavior

search_context_size.title: Search Context Size
search_context_size.description: Amount of search context to include (low, medium, or high)

search_type.title: Search Type
search_type.description: Search type (fast for speed, pro for quality, auto to let the model decide)

image_results_enhanced_relevance.title: Image Results Enhanced Relevance
image_results_enhanced_relevance.description: When true, applies enhanced relevance filtering to image results
